ORDER GRANTING WANTICKETS RDM, LLC'S MOTION TO STAY
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-17-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WANTICKETS RDM, LLC MOTION TO STAY IS GRANTED AND THIS CASE IS STAYED UNTIL THE RESOLUTION OF CASE NUMBER 654277/2016 CURRENTLY PENDING IN THE SUPREME COURT OF THE STATE OF NEW YORK. IF THE NEW YORK COURT DISMISSES OR STAYS THE NEW YORK CASE ON FORUM NONCONVENIENS OR JURISDICTION GROUNDS, THE STAY OF THIS CASE WILL CEASE TO BE EFFECTIVE. JUDICIAL ECONOMY, COMITY AND AVOIDANCE OF POTENTIALLY INCONSISTENT RULINGS ALL FAVOR HAVING THE PARTIES' DISPUTES RESOLVED IN ONE FORUM AND THUS THIS COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO STAY THIS CASE IN FAVOR OF PERMITTING THE NEW YORK CASE TO PROCEED. IF THE NEW YORK COURT BELIEVES THAT THIS COURT SHOULD RESOLVE ALL CLAIMS BETWEEN THE PARTIES, THEN THIS COURT IS WILLING TO BE THE SOLE FORUM FOR RESOLUTION OF THE PARTIES' DISPUTES. DISCOVERY IN THE NAME OF THE CALIFORNIA ACTION IS DEEMED TO BE DISCOVERY IN THE NEW YORK ACTION. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR NO. 5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Michael K. Ng of the law offices of Kobre & Kim LLP (415.582.4803) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Laurie Edelstein of the law offices of Steptoe (650.687.9570) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT WANTICKETS RDM, LLC Motion To Stay is GRANTED and this case is stayed until the resolution of case number 654277/2016 currently pending in the Supreme Court of the State of New York. If the New York court dismisses or stays the New York case on forum nonconveniens or jurisdiction grounds, the stay of this case will cease to be effective. Judicial economy, comity and avoidance of potentially inconsistent rulings all favor having the parties' disputes resolved in one forum and thus this court exercises its discretion to stay this case in favor of permitting the New York case to proceed. If the New York court believes that this court should resolve all claims between the parties, then this court is willing to be the sole forum for resolution of the parties' disputes. Discovery in the name of the California action is deemed to be discovery in the New York action. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Off Calendar
